sgTip: Final preparations — ensure everyone has their Celestial Weapons if you have the crests/sigils. Stock Megalixirs, Elixirs, and Phoenix Downs. You can return to the airship between Sin exterior fights.

subLocations.name: Airship En Route to Sin
subLocations.prose: Before engaging Sin, visit Maester Mika on the Highbridge for the key to defeating Yu Yevon — no fight needed. When ready, speak to Cid and head to the external deck. The fin fights are manageable; keep your Overdrives for the Head and beyond. You can return to the airship between each exterior battle to restock and heal.

bosses.strategy: HP: 65,000. Left Fin is the first of Sin's four exterior fights — the order is Left Fin, Right Fin, Head, then Core inside Sin. The Fin uses Gravija, which reduces all party HP by 75%, so follow it immediately with Mega-Potions (flat recovery beats percentage heals here). Save your Overdrives and big summons for the Head and Core; the fins don't require them and the gauntlet is long.

HP: 65,000. Second exterior fight — same kit as Left Fin, including Gravija (75% HP reduction on everyone). You can return to the airship between fights to restock; Cid can also fire missiles if you pull the ship back, dealing modest bonus damage. Keep Overdrives banked — they're better spent on the Head and Core that follow.

HP: 140,000. Watch for Gravija (reduces all HP by 75% — follow with Mega-Potions for flat recovery). Dispel any buffs. Standard damage doesn't work with Gravity-based spells but everything else does. Sustained Overdrives and Hastega.

HP: 36,000. After defeating the Head you enter Sin itself — the Core is the fourth and final fight in the exterior gauntlet. It has lower HP than the fins, so the Overdrives and summons saved through the earlier fights will end this quickly. Burn everything here; it's the last checkpoint before the endgame interior sequence.
